title: crotalaria leschenaultii
intro: Crotalaria leschenaultii, also known as Leschenault's rattle pod, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria leschenaultii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
